title: And Then There Were None
desc: A classic mystery novel by Agatha Christie about ten strangers stranded on an island.

title: Murder on the Orient Express
desc: Agatha Christie's famous detective story featuring Hercule Poirot on a snowbound train.

title: One of Us Is Lying
desc: A gripping young adult mystery by Karen M. McManus about four students and a deadly secret.

title: The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Night-Time
desc: A unique mystery novel by Mark Haddon told from the perspective of a boy with autism.

title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
desc: Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's most famous Sherlock Holmes adventure involving a supernatural hound.

title: The Silent Patient
desc: A psychological thriller by Alex Michaelides about a woman who stops speaking after a shocking crime.

title: A Good Girl's Guide to Murder
desc: A gripping mystery novel by Peter Swanson about a high school student investigating a murder.
